rules.title: Track Every Mile and Expense
rules.description: Use a mileage tracking app or logbook to record all business-related miles and expenses. This maximizes tax deductions and ensures accurate income reporting.

rules.title: Set Aside Money for Taxes
rules.description: Save 20-30% of each payout in a separate account for quarterly estimated taxes. Gig income is not pre-taxed, so you'll owe self-employment and income tax.

rules.title: Know Your True Costs Per Mile
rules.description: Factor in fuel, maintenance, depreciation, insurance, and cleaning. Calculate your cost per mile to avoid working for less than break-even.

rules.title: Maintain Proper Insurance Coverage
rules.description: Standard personal auto insurance often excludes commercial use. Get a rideshare/delivery endorsement or commercial policy to avoid claim denials.

rules.title: Never Chase Surge or Boost Zones Blindly
rules.description: Driving 15 minutes to a surge area may waste time and gas. Factor in deadhead miles and opportunity cost before repositioning.

rules.title: Keep Your Acceptance Rate Reasonable
rules.description: You are an independent contractor. Reject unprofitable trips (e.g., long pickups or low pay per mile). Focus on trips that meet your minimum acceptable rate.

rules.title: Stay Hydrated, Rested, and Safe
rules.description: Fatigue leads to accidents and poor decisions. Take breaks, stretch, and never drive impaired. Your health and safety come first.

rules.title: Know How to Handle Difficult Passengers or Deliveries
rules.description: Follow app policies for unruly riders, bad addresses, or undeliverable orders. Document issues with photos or messages to protect your ratings and payments.

rules.title: Maximize Peak Hours, but Not Every Peak Hour
rules.description: Work during high-demand periods (e.g., Friday nights, rainy weather) but avoid oversaturating weekends if per-hour earnings drop. Balance with off-peak errands.

rules.title: Have a Multi-App Strategy
rules.description: Run two or three apps (Uber, Lyft, DoorDash, etc.) and pick the best trip from any. But never use both simultaneously while driving – pause one while on a trip.

rules.title: Avoid Long Pickup Times
rules.description: Reject requests with long pickup distances or times unless the payout compensates for the dead miles.

rules.title: Use Heatmaps Strategically
rules.description: Heatmaps show demand, not guaranteed earnings. Use them as hints, not instructions.

rules.title: Know Your Minimum Pay Threshold
rules.description: Set a personal minimum (e.g., $1.20/mile or $20/hour) and decline anything below it.

rules.title: Keep Your Car Clean Daily
rules.description: A clean car improves ratings and tips. Wipe down surfaces and remove trash between trips.

rules.title: Use a Fuel Rewards Program
rules.description: Stack fuel rewards, credit card points, and app discounts to reduce operating costs.

rules.title: Avoid Idle Time
rules.description: If you’re sitting more than 10 minutes without a request, reposition to a known hotspot.

rules.title: Know the Best Zones in Your City
rules.description: Airports, downtown, nightlife, and event venues often produce consistent demand.

rules.title: Master Airport Rules
rules.description: Learn queue behavior, staging areas, and peak arrival times to avoid wasting hours.

rules.title: Avoid Low-Tip Restaurants
rules.description: Some restaurants consistently produce low tips or long wait times. Track and avoid them.

rules.title: Track Restaurant Wait Times
rules.description: Know which restaurants delay orders. Time is money—avoid slow kitchens.

rules.title: Use Hotspot Rotation
rules.description: Cycle between 2–3 high-demand areas instead of waiting in one place.

rules.title: Avoid Traffic Bottlenecks
rules.description: Heavy traffic kills earnings. Learn shortcuts and avoid congested zones during rush hour.

rules.title: Know When to End Your Shift
rules.description: If earnings drop below your threshold, stop. Don’t chase losses.

rules.title: Use a Dash Cam
rules.description: Protect yourself from false claims, accidents, and disputes with video evidence.

rules.title: Keep a Phone Mount
rules.description: Hands-free navigation is safer and prevents distracted driving violations.

rules.title: Carry Basic Supplies
rules.description: Keep napkins, sanitizer, a flashlight, and a tire gauge for emergencies.

rules.title: Avoid Unnecessary Conversations
rules.description: Be polite but avoid sensitive topics. Keep interactions professional.

rules.title: Use Navigation Apps Wisely
rules.description: Compare Uber/Lyft routing with Google Maps or Waze to avoid inefficient routes.

rules.title: Know Local Events
rules.description: Concerts, sports games, and festivals create predictable demand spikes.

rules.title: Avoid Dead Miles
rules.description: Always aim to drive with purpose. Unpaid miles destroy profitability.

rules.title: Use Scheduled Rides Strategically
rules.description: Scheduled rides can guarantee early-morning earnings without waiting.

rules.title: Avoid High-Risk Areas at Night
rules.description: Safety first. Decline trips to unsafe neighborhoods during late hours.

rules.title: Keep Your Phone Charged
rules.description: Use a fast charger and backup battery to avoid downtime.

rules.title: Use a Mileage Deduction Strategy
rules.description: Choose between standard mileage or actual expenses based on which yields higher deductions.

rules.title: Track Wear and Tear
rules.description: Monitor tire tread, brakes, and oil life to avoid costly breakdowns.

rules.title: Avoid Multi-Stop Deliveries
rules.description: Multi-stop orders often pay poorly for the time invested.

rules.title: Know When to Decline Stacked Orders
rules.description: Only accept stacked orders if both pay well and follow a logical route.

rules.title: Use Customer Notes
rules.description: Read delivery notes carefully to avoid delays or mistakes.

rules.title: Avoid Long Wait Restaurants
rules.description: If a restaurant consistently delays orders, decline requests from it.

rules.title: Keep Snacks in the Car
rules.description: Avoid hunger-induced fatigue and maintain focus.

rules.title: Know Your City’s Rush Hour Patterns
rules.description: Plan around predictable traffic to maximize efficiency.

rules.title: Avoid Toll Roads Unless Worth It
rules.description: Only take tolls if the payout compensates for the cost.

rules.title: Use In-App Messaging for Documentation
rules.description: Keep all communication inside the app for protection.

rules.title: Avoid High-Risk Weather
rules.description: Snow, ice, and storms increase accident risk. Only work if safe.

rules.title: Know Your Car’s Fuel Efficiency
rules.description: Track MPG to identify mechanical issues early and optimize costs.

rules.title: Use a Maintenance Schedule
rules.description: Follow a strict maintenance routine to extend vehicle life.

rules.title: Avoid Overworking
rules.description: Fatigue reduces earnings and increases risk. Pace yourself.

rules.title: Use a Tip Strategy
rules.description: Be polite, efficient, and professional to encourage tipping.

rules.title: Avoid Unnecessary Small Talk
rules.description: Some passengers prefer quiet. Read the room.

rules.title: Keep Windows Clean
rules.description: Visibility and professionalism matter for safety and ratings.

rules.title: Know When to Cancel
rules.description: Cancel only when necessary to avoid penalties and maintain ratings.

rules.title: Avoid Delivering to Apartments Without Clear Directions
rules.description: Complex buildings waste time. Decline if instructions are unclear.

rules.title: Use a Parking Strategy
rules.description: Avoid tickets by parking legally and safely during deliveries.

rules.title: Keep Your Car Smelling Neutral
rules.description: Avoid strong scents. Neutral is best for all passengers.

rules.title: Avoid Overloading Your Schedule
rules.description: Don’t stack too many commitments. Leave room for breaks.

rules.title: Use a Weekly Earnings Goal
rules.description: Set a target and stop when you hit it to avoid burnout.

rules.title: Know Your Best Hours
rules.description: Track which hours produce the highest earnings and focus on them.

rules.title: Avoid Low-Pay Promotions
rules.description: Not all quests or bonuses are worth the time investment.

rules.title: Use a Car Vacuum Weekly
rules.description: A clean interior improves ratings and comfort.

rules.title: Avoid Driving Angry or Stressed
rules.description: Emotional driving leads to mistakes and poor decisions.

rules.title: Use a Backup Phone
rules.description: A second device prevents downtime if your main phone fails.

rules.title: Know Your App’s Hidden Features
rules.description: Learn destination filters, heatmaps, and earnings breakdowns.

rules.title: Avoid Taking Orders Without Tips
rules.description: Some platforms show tip amounts. Decline zero-tip orders when possible.

rules.title: Use a Tire Pressure Monitor
rules.description: Proper tire pressure improves MPG and safety.

rules.title: Avoid Delivering to Dorms
rules.description: Dorms often require long walks and confusing navigation.

rules.title: Use a Night Driving Strategy
rules.description: Stick to well-lit areas and avoid risky zones.

rules.title: Know When to Switch Apps
rules.description: If one app slows down, switch to another to maintain earnings.

rules.title: Avoid Overly Complicated Orders
rules.description: Special instructions often lead to delays and low tips.

rules.title: Use a Weekly Maintenance Check
rules.description: Check fluids, tires, and lights every week.

rules.title: Avoid Delivering During Restaurant Rush
rules.description: Peak dining hours cause long wait times. Time your shifts wisely.

rules.title: Use a Personal Safety App
rules.description: Share your location with trusted contacts during late-night shifts.

rules.title: Avoid Overly Heavy Orders
rules.description: Large grocery orders can cause injury and slowdowns.

rules.title: Know Your Car’s Limits
rules.description: Avoid overloading your vehicle or driving in unsafe conditions.

rules.title: Use a Fuel-Efficient Driving Style
rules.description: Smooth acceleration and braking improve MPG and reduce wear.

rules.title: Avoid Delivering to Gated Communities Without Codes
rules.description: Waiting at gates wastes time and kills earnings.

rules.title: Use a Daily Earnings Tracker
rules.description: Track earnings per hour and per mile to optimize shifts.

rules.title: Avoid Taking Orders Far From Hotspots
rules.description: Deliveries that end in low-demand areas reduce efficiency.

rules.title: Use a Weather-Based Strategy
rules.description: Rain increases demand but also risk. Adjust accordingly.

rules.title: Avoid Over-Reliance on One App
rules.description: Diversify to avoid downtime and maximize opportunities.

rules.title: Use a Weekly Rest Day
rules.description: Recovery prevents burnout and keeps you sharp.

rules.title: Avoid Delivering to Businesses After Hours
rules.description: Closed offices or locked buildings cause delays.

rules.title: Use a Route Optimization Strategy
rules.description: Plan efficient routes to reduce time and fuel usage.

rules.title: Avoid Taking Orders With Long Walks
rules.description: Large apartment complexes or campuses slow you down.

rules.title: Use a Tip Reminder Strategy
rules.description: A polite thank-you message can encourage tipping.

rules.title: Avoid Delivering During Extreme Heat
rules.description: Protect your health and avoid overheating your vehicle.

rules.title: Use a Backup Navigation App
rules.description: If one app glitches, switch instantly to avoid delays.

rules.title: Avoid Taking Orders With Long Prep Times
rules.description: Some cuisines take longer to prepare. Track and avoid them.

rules.title: Use a Car Maintenance Fund
rules.description: Set aside money weekly for repairs and upkeep.

rules.title: Avoid Delivering to Hospitals
rules.description: Hospitals often require long walks and confusing navigation.

rules.title: Use a Shift Start Routine
rules.description: Prepare your car, apps, and mindset before starting.

rules.title: Avoid Delivering to Schools
rules.description: School campuses are confusing and time-consuming.

rules.title: Use a Shift End Routine
rules.description: Clean your car, log expenses, and review earnings.

rules.title: Avoid Taking Orders With Low Base Pay
rules.description: Low base pay often means low tips and wasted time.

rules.title: Use a Weekly Review
rules.description: Analyze your best zones, hours, and apps to improve strategy.

rules.title: Avoid Delivering to Hotels Without Clear Instructions
rules.description: Hotels often require long walks and confusing layouts.

rules.title: Use a Fuel Budget
rules.description: Track weekly fuel spending to maintain profitability.

rules.title: Avoid Taking Orders That End Far From Home
rules.description: Long return trips reduce net earnings.
